things.name: Parque Arvi Cable Car
things.description: Metro cable car over the comunas hillside neighbourhoods to the Arvi forest park

things.name: Pablo Escobar Tours
things.description: Responsible tours of the narco history including La Catedral prison and Monaco building

things.name: Plaza Botero
things.description: Fernando Botero's 23 bronze voluptuous sculptures in the open air beside the Museum of Antioquia

things.name: El Poblado & Parque Lleras
things.description: Medellin's upscale neighbourhood with the best restaurants, bars and boutique hotels

things.name: Guatape & El Penol Rock
things.description: 740 steps to the top of a colossal granite monolith with views over reservoir islands

things.name: Metrocable & Communas Tour
things.description: Outdoor escalators and cable cars serving hillside comunas transformed by urban renewal

things.name: Jardin Botanical Garden
things.description: Beautiful urban garden with orchids - Colombia's national flower - and a butterfly house

things.name: Santa Fe de Antioquia
things.description: Perfectly preserved colonial town 80km north - cobblestone streets and whitewashed churches

things.name: Feria de las Flores (Flower Festival)
things.description: August festival with the world's finest flower parade - silleteros carry flower displays

things.name: Mondongo Paisa at a Fonda Antioquena
things.description: Medellin's hearty tripe and vegetable stew in a traditional farmhouse restaurant
